program.description_html:
Weekly highlights from Canada’s #1 coast-to-coast community of politically and socially progressive podcasts including Alberta Advantage, The Breach Show, Tech Won’t Save Us, Press Progress Sources & 55 more.

This podcast is syndicated for community and campus radio at CIUT 89.5FM in Toronto, CKUT 90.3FM in Montreal, CKUW 95.9FM in Winnipeg and at Vancouver Co-op Radio. As of January 2024, it has moved from the 3rd Wednesday of every month from 5-6pm to every Wednesday from 7-8 pm.

See all the Harbinger podcasts at harbingermedianetwork.com
